name: kidma-plugins
description: Official Kidma plugin library — lesson planning, presentations, and brand assets for Claude Code

plugins.name: kidma-company-overview
plugins.description: Full Kidma company context — programs, metrics, history, business model

plugins.name: kidma-brand-guidelines
plugins.description: Official Kidma brand styling — colors, typography, logos, light/dark mode

plugins.name: kidma-lesson-generator
plugins.description: Generate complete Kidma lesson plans following the Understand-Try-Create pedagogy

plugins.name: kidma-lesson-docx
plugins.description: Export a Kidma lesson plan to a branded Word (.docx) document

plugins.name: kidma-lesson-extractor
plugins.description: Extract and reverse-engineer content from existing Kidma lesson materials

plugins.name: kidma-lesson-summary
plugins.description: Generate a 1-2 page branded PDF lesson summary for students

plugins.name: kidma-presentation-planner
plugins.description: Plan Kidma lesson presentations slide-by-slide with user approval

plugins.name: kidma-presentation-builder
plugins.description: Build a branded Kidma PPTX presentation file from an approved plan

plugins.name: kidma-write-article
plugins.description: Draft a complete Hebrew article for Kidma writing surfaces — produces a single .md content block (frontmatter + Markdown body)
